Production Creative Process

From Idea to Final Version

  1. Pre-production
  2. CPS
  3. Director Treatment
  4. Scriptwriting
  5. Story Board
  6. Cast / Crew Selection
  7. Equipment Planning
  8. Prep
  9. PPM
  10. Shooting
  11. Rough Cut
  12. Sound Design & Mixing
  13. Music
  14. Editing & Assembly
  15. VFX & CGI
  16. Coloring
  17. First Draft
  18. Client Review
  19. Final Video

TV & Commercial Ads

A commercial is not just product footage. It is a decision about how the brand will be seen, remembered, and trusted.

At Art Ratio, we treat TV and commercial ads as a full production, from the first brief to the final second on screen.

We start by understanding the brand, the audience, and the outcome the ad needs to achieve.

Then we build an idea and execution path that serves the objective, not just beautiful visuals.

A strong ad does not depend on one impressive frame. It depends on a clear concept, solid direction, and disciplined execution from start to finish.

What your commercial production can include

  • Idea and scenario development
  • Directorial treatment and visual direction
  • Selecting the right shooting locations
  • Lighting design and cinematic style
  • Full production team management
  • High-end technical filming execution
  • Professional editing with pacing that serves the message
  • Color grading and final finishing ready for broadcast

Every element is intentional. Every second has purpose. Every shot serves the message.

Whether it is for TV, digital platforms, or a full campaign, we ensure the final output reflects your brand at its best.

We do not create ads that appear and fade. We craft visual experiences that elevate brand value and leave a lasting impact.

At Art Ratio, we transform your idea from a simple message into work that is watched with confidence and remembered for long.

A look at our recent TV and commercial ads work, where the idea, direction, and execution come together in one clear visual result.

Need a commercial that presents the brand with clarity and impact?
Let’s plan the ad around the result you want people to remember.

FAQ's

Questions clients ask before producing a commercial

Do you help with the idea and script, or do we need to arrive with everything ready?

We can support from the idea stage, script development, and treatment, or step into an existing concept if you already have a clear direction. The scope depends on what the project needs.

Is this service for TV only, or can the ad be prepared for digital platforms too?

Both are possible. We can produce for TV broadcast, digital campaigns, social media ads, or a campaign that needs multiple outputs from the same shoot.

What do clients usually need to prepare before production starts?

Usually we align on the objective, audience, product or service details, timeline, approvals, and any brand guidelines. After that, we can help structure the rest of the production requirements.

How long does a commercial project usually take?

That depends on the complexity of the concept, prep needs, cast, locations, and post-production. Some ads move fast, while others need a fuller production window. We define that early so the schedule is realistic.

Do you handle casting, locations, crew, and the full production setup?

Yes. If the project needs full production support, we can handle crew structure, casting coordination, location planning, equipment, scheduling, and production management around the shoot.

Can one production be delivered in more than one version or format?

Yes. We can plan the production so the same shoot serves multiple edits, durations, aspect ratios, or platform-ready versions, as long as that is defined from the beginning.

Art Ratio is a media production company based in Saudi Arabia
We deliver commercials, event coverage, social media visuals, and commercial photography with sharp execution and brand-focused visuals
